positive: Minimalist abstract cosmic forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central grouping of glowing, stylized trees and ethereal, geometric animal shapes (like glowing fox silhouettes and stylized deer). The overall aesthetic should be highly contrasting, utilizing deep indigo and midnight blue backgrounds contrasted with vibrant teal, electric lavender, and glowing cyan accents. Strong clean silhouette style, emphasizing negative space. Inspired by Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints blended with psychedelic bioluminescence. Suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment (DTG) apparel print. Central composition, centered forest path.
negative: low resolution, blurry, text, watermark, logos, signature, messy, clutter, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifact, overexposed, solid colors, photorealism, realistic rendering
